title: Build Playwright E2E test suite for m4to.com
description: Stand up a Playwright test project in this repo and write end-to-end tests against the live site m4to.com. Research the site first to identify its core user flows, then encode each flow as a test. The suite must be runnable locally with a single command.
acceptance_criteria: Playwright is installed and configured in this repo; `npx playwright test` runs the suite.
Site research identifies m4to.com's core user flows and is reflected in the test plan.
Each identified core flow has at least one Playwright test exercising it against the live site.
The full suite passes locally (green run) at hand-off.

comments.author: orchestrator
comments.body: Created at human direction: skip CI (TASK-001) and the other seeded placeholder tickets; build Playwright tests for m4to.com instead. Tier uat-only — the deliverable is the test suite itself; verification is a green run plus human confirmation of flow coverage.
